name: What if my injury qualifies for Social Security Disability too?
description: Workers comp + SSDI offset each other. Total can't exceed 80% pre-injury wage. Lawyer maximizes both.

mainEntity.name: What if my injury qualifies for Social Security Disability too?

acceptedAnswer.text: Workers comp + SSDI offset each other. Total can't exceed 80% pre-injury wage. Lawyer maximizes both.
